= Contents =
  - [[#TMUX|TMUX]]
      - [[#TMUX#panes|panes]]
    - [[#TMUX#plug-ins|plug-ins]]
      - [[#TMUX#plug-ins#tmux-gitbar|tmux-gitbar]]
        - [[#TMUX#plug-ins#tmux-gitbar#overview|overview]]

= TMUX =

=== panes ===

list panes & windows:: `^b s`, `tmux ls`

== plug-ins ==

=== tmux-gitbar ===

==== overview ====
`branch - remote - ↑[sync to remote] | ●[staged files] x[merge conflict] ⚑[stash file] ✖︎+[changed, but not staged files]...[untracked files]`
